<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<section id="architecture">
<h1>Architecture</h1>
<section id="data-flow">
<h2>Data flow</h2>
<div class="highlight-text notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>source document
  -&gt; booktx extract
  -&gt; .booktx/chunks/*.json
  -&gt; selected profile context/store
  -&gt; translations/&lt;profile&gt;/translation-store.json
  -&gt; booktx validate --profile &lt;profile&gt;
  -&gt; translations/&lt;profile&gt;/translated/*.json   (compatibility export)
  -&gt; booktx build --profile &lt;profile&gt;
  -&gt; translations/&lt;profile&gt;/output/book.&lt;target&gt;.&lt;ext&gt;
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="profile-isolation">
<h2>Profile isolation</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span></code> separates two concerns:</p>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p><strong>Source scope</strong>: the source file, protected names, chunk extraction, and chapter metadata.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Profile scope</strong>: translation intent, identity defaults, version history, accepted translations, durable ingest files, validation reports, and rebuilt output.</p></li>
</ol>
<p>The key invariant is:</p>
<div class="highlight-text notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>Profile = hard isolation boundary
Version = history/candidate boundary inside that profile
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Implications:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>normal <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">translation</span> <span class="pre">compare</span></code> compares versions inside one selected profile;</p></li>
<li><p>cross-profile inspection is explicit via <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">profile</span> <span class="pre">compare</span></code>;</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">build</span></code> never reads another profile’s store;</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">validate</span></code> only reports on the selected profile;</p></li>
<li><p>one shared source can safely back multiple target languages and multiple model experiments.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
